title: Compliance Analyst
description:
P&G is a diversified consumer goods company with iconic brands reaching 5B+ people daily across 180+ countries.

We're seeking a Compliance Analyst to join our Consumer Goods team in Philadelphia. This role offers the opportunity to contribute meaningfully to our mission while developing your professional skills in a collaborative environment.
responsibilities: Monitor regulatory changes and assess impact on business operations and policies
Conduct compliance audits and identify policy violations or risk areas
Develop compliance training and communication materials for employees
Investigate compliance concerns and implement corrective action plans
Maintain compliance documentation and audit trails
Partner with department heads to ensure ongoing compliance with regulations

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Business, Law, or related field; MBA preferred
requirements.experience_years: 2-4 years in compliance, regulatory affairs, or quality assurance
certifications: Compliance certification (CCE) or legal credential preferred
